closes_dod_item: DB user serving_writer PG account isolation
actions: GRANT USAGE ON SCHEMA serving TO serving_writer
GRANT SELECT ON ALL TABLES IN SCHEMA serving TO serving_writer
GRANT INSERT ON serving.context_bundle_log TO serving_writer
ALTER DEFAULT PRIVILEGES IN SCHEMA serving GRANT SELECT ON TABLES TO serving_writer
REVOKE ALL ON SCHEMA knowledge FROM serving_writer
REVOKE ALL ON SCHEMA knowledge_industrial FROM serving_writer
REVOKE ALL ON SCHEMA gateway FROM serving_writer

dify_app_import_KS-FIX-19_full_chain.meaning: Dify Cloud → kb.diyuai.cc → diyu-serving (serving_writer) → real PG SELECT serving.* + INSERT bundle_log 全链 PASS

red_line_enforced.before: diyu-serving 容器以高权 PG 账号 diyu 运行 — 理论上能读 knowledge.* / knowledge_industrial.*
red_line_enforced.after: diyu-serving 容器以低权 PG 账号 serving_writer 运行 — 仅 SELECT serving.* + INSERT serving.context_bundle_log，对 knowledge.* / knowledge_industrial.* / gateway.* 写读全部 permission denied

secret_handling: PG_PASSWORD 不入 git；明文仅存于 /opt/diyu-serving/.env (chmod 600 root only) 与 /tmp/sw_pw.txt（本地一次性）
